message:
chore: add .rch-target/ to gitignore

Remote compilation helper build artifacts (rch worker output) should
not be tracked. The .rch/ directory was already ignored but the
.rch-target/ build output directory was missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,8 +104,9 @@ docs/formal/*.tlc.log
 .cargo_*/
 .cargo-*/
 
-# Remote compilation helper cache
+# Remote compilation helper cache and build artifacts
 .rch/
+.rch-target/
 
 # Agent mail SQLite databases (runtime state, not project data)
 storage.sqlite3
